description_long: This object depicts an adult pedestrian with a highly distorted and elongated form, as if the body and limbs have been unnaturally stretched and twisted. The figure's torso and legs are visible, but the arms and upper body appear to merge into long, ribbon-like extensions that stretch outward in both directions. The clothing is rendered with abstract, blocky patterns and colors, and the lower legs and feet are bent at odd angles, giving the figure a surreal, almost liquid appearance. The head is relatively normal in shape, with short hair, but the neck and shoulders are pulled and warped into the extended forms. The overall impression is of a human figure caught in a moment of extreme deformation, with exaggerated proportions and a lack of clear anatomical structure.
description: A highly distorted adult pedestrian figure with elongated, ribbon-like limbs and abstract, blocky clothing patterns. The body appears stretched and twisted, giving a surreal and fluid impression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, torso, and the dramatic stretching of the arms into long, ribbon-like extensions.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the back of the head, the warped torso, and the extreme elongation of the limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the head and the symmetrical extension of the arms and legs.
description_view_3: Angled rear view emphasizing the twisted lower body and the abstract, flowing shapes of the extended limbs.
attribute_clothing_type: long dress with geometric pattern and fitted bodice
attribute_posture: unnaturally stretched and twisted, with limbs extended outward
